treatment_information.specific_treatment: Right femoral artery access bronchial artery particle embolization to stasis

treatment_information.treatment_response: Negative for malignant cells, bronchial epithelial cells, pulmonary macrophages and abundant blood.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with hemoptysis and was evaluated.
Anticoagulation therapy stopped per hematologist recommendation.
Episodes of hematemesis occurred leading to hospital admission.
Patient received antibiotics for community-acquired pneumonia for 5 days.

patient_outcome.final_status: Clear and coherent with activity status ambulatory - independent.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with primary care provider within one week and INR check within specified days.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Expected to continue coughing up phlegm with some dried blood.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient is expected to continue coughing up phlegm with some dried blood, which is to be expected.
